chunks.text: 1 ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH, KARACHI. Cr. Bail Appl. No.1212 of 2024 (Abdul Qadir vs. The State) Date Order with signature of Judge For hearing of Bail Application. 31.10.2024. Mr. Jamroz Khan, Advocate a/w Applicant Mr. Khadim Hussain, Addl: PG Sindh a/w PI Abdul Nabi, P.S. Kalakot, Karachi O R D E R MUHAMMAD IQBAL KALHORO J: Allegedly applicant driving a coach hit a son of complainant, namely, Abdu Jana, aged about 10 years on 10.03.2024 at Chakiwara No.1 near Post Office, Lyari, Kalakot, Karachi. As a result of which, he died. Complainant, registered FIR on the same day u/s 320 PPC, which is bailable. 2. Learned counsel for the applicant has submitted that even otherwise applicant has compromised the offence with complainant and such application have already been submitted before the trial Court. He has placed on record a copy of such applications. According to him, the process for compromise is pending before the Court. 3. Learned Addl: PG Sindh, however has opposed bail and stated that the complainant is not present. 4. Notwithstanding, the offence is bailable and it appears that parties have compromised the matter and such process is pending before the trial Court. In view of the above facts and circumstances, this bail application is allowed and ad-interim pre-arrest bail granted to the applicant vide order dated 04.06.2024 is hereby confirmed on same terms and conditions. 5. Bail application stands disposed of in the above terms. The observations made hereinabove are tentative in nature and would not prejudice case of either party at trial. J U D G E Rafiq/P.A
